title: Cohere Dataset
description: Represents a dataset managed through the Cohere Datasets API, used for embed jobs, fine-tuning, and other batch processing tasks.

id.description: The unique identifier of the dataset.

name.description: The human-readable name of the dataset.

dataset_type.description: The type of dataset, which determines its schema and compatible operations.

validation_status.description: The current validation status of the dataset after upload.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the dataset was created.

updated_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the dataset was last updated.

schema.description: The expected schema definition for the dataset records.

required_fields.description: The field names required in each record of the dataset.

preserve_fields.description: The field names that are preserved through processing.

validation_error.description: The error message if dataset validation failed.

validation_warnings.description: Warning messages for rows that were dropped during validation.
